name: Hero Rescue
author: Poki
description: Hero Rescue is a skill game developed by QKY Games. In this game, you are in charge of controlling a rescue helicopter. Click or tap on the screen to lift the rescue chopper up. Pilot the chopper skillfully and rescue civilians from a wildfire. You get more stars if you don't leave anyone behind. Can you finish Hero Rescue without any casualties? Ultimate Fire Game How to play: Click or tap on the screen to lift the rescue chopper up. About the creator: Perfect Dunk is created by QKY Games. Play their other casual games avoid-dying, fire-road, Pocket Hockey , and Neon War on Poki!
